Lesson: adding a tool incurs a temporary I12/I13 annotation-completeness cost recoverable next cycle by formalizing tool-run annotations. v1.18.0_strategy.note: First open_world (web_search/web_fetch) integration cycle for this program. Added a deterministic five-hexagram (本/变/互/综/错) computation layer (independently re-verified: 8 symmetric self-reverse hexagrams, all-64 错卦!=本卦) plus a web-research explanation node with full injection guardrails (query sanitization, http(s)-only fetch, untrusted-data treatment, OWASP LLM01) and graceful degrade to local 《周易》. Lesson: a feature that adds both cognitive surface AND a new open_world tool incurs a combined C + I12/I13 advisory dip that is recoverable by formalizing tool annotations and adding worked-example fixtures next cycle; the additive correctness/utility gain (five-hexagram detailed explanation) justifies the cosmetic score dip by design.

gh_contribution.note: pipeline_evolve scan of the single modified file (Pattern A). total_execution_content_chars=34573. GH3 residual=603 chars = verbatim duplication of EU AI Act Art.50 / COPPA 2026 / Digital Omnibus regulatory-provenance prose across system.description, GiveAdvice.constraints, SaveRecord.constraints (5 phrases x2 occurrences each). density=603/34573=0.0174 <= 0.05 => GREEN. GH1 version annotations (B1/B2/B3 v1.18/v1.19 + B4/B5 v1.14.0) are inline provenance on live execution content (综卦/错卦/ExplainHexagram node, teen-safety, Art.50 watermarking) — frozen per v1.18.0 precedent, GH5-protected, execution-bearing, not counted. GH6=0 (no expired branches). GH7 Error fields are protocol-mandated retry/circuit-breaker/fallback/inform structure (validate.aisop.json checks these keywords) — not residual. Methodology note: prior v1.18.0 recorded 0.0 by fully excluding the GH3 regulatory duplication as frozen; this cycle counts it as a SUGGEST_ONLY consolidation advisory (still GREEN). Not a genuine degradation.
